subject: Phase G: RLHF Data Capture
description:
Implement RLHF data collection:
- titan/learning/rlhf.py (RLHF data collection)
- titan/learning/feedback.py (Human feedback handlers)
- titan/learning/reward_signals.py (Reward signal extraction)
- Modify titan/observability/langfuse.py for RLHF samples
- Modify dashboard/app.py for feedback UI endpoint
